meaning: adj.尖叫的,令人惊愕的,引人捧腹大笑的
examples: She was screaming at the top of her voice.
Then she just lost it and started screaming.
We saw lots of children banging on the windows to get out and families screaming.
"I remember people screaming, crying, praying inside, " says the 83-year-old, his eyes occasionally glazing over.
